Brown_York: T_mn=2 C5(K_mn-Kh_mn) in the declared sign convention
action: S_GHY=2 C5 integral_M4 sqrt(-h) K for each actual boundary with its outward normal
claim_boundary: This is an exact equatorial geometry and conditional boundary/localization reduction. It does not identify observed spacetime, physical gauge groups or charges, a physical fermion equation, magnetic monopoles, measured couplings, an absolute unit, or full BHSM.
equator_background: K_mn=0 makes the value, momentum, and background Brown-York stress zero
hemispheres: opposite outward normals; cutting and summing requires both sides/interface matching
variation: retained to cancel normal metric-derivative variations
